ItacWorkItem.LongTitle: Et De Nonnullis Fontibus Naturalibus. Excellentiss. Principi D. Johanni Fernandez Pacecco, Marchioni Villenae, Ascalonae Duci, &c. Regni Neap. Proregi Strenuiss. Victori, Pio, Felici Noncupata.
ItacWorkItem.Notes: On pp. 128-29 the author mentions the Investiganti Academy and its members.

Dedicatees.ItacPersonItem: Pacecco,Johanni Fernandez,Marquis of Villa; Duke of Escalona; Viceroy of Naples (1702-1707),

ItacWorkItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
